empty.title: Marine & Offshore Expert System

suggestions.title: Try asking:
items: What are DNV requirements for LNG cargo tank structures?
Compare ABS and DNV rules for bulk carrier hatch covers
What does IMO require for ballast water treatment?
What is the minimum plate thickness for a container ship's main deck according to CCS?
Explain the fatigue assessment procedure for offshore crane pedestals

help.title: Help & Documentation
help.subtitle: Learn how to use the Marine & Offshore Expert System effectively.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.body: Type your engineering question in the chat input and press Enter. The system searches maritime regulations, classification society rules (DNV, ABS, CCS, LR, BV), and engineering knowledge to provide citation-backed answers.

askingQuestions.title: Asking Good Questions
askingQuestions.body: Include specific clause references (e.g., 'DNV Pt.4 Ch.3 §5') for precise results. Mention the vessel type, steel grade, or system for domain-specific answers.

uploading.title: Uploading Documents
uploading.body: Drag & drop PDF, DOCX, XLSX, or image files anywhere on the page, or click the attach button. The system parses the document and uses its content to answer your questions.

webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.body: Toggle the globe button to include live web search results in your answers. Useful for recent regulatory updates or manufacturer specifications not yet in the knowledge base.

citations.title: Citations
citations.body: Every answer includes numbered citations in the right panel. Click a citation number to see the exact source: classification society, regulation chapter, section, and text excerpt.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.body: Your chat history is saved automatically in the sidebar. Right-click any conversation to rename, share, pin, or delete it. Use the search bar to find past conversations.

settings.title: Settings & Account
settings.body: Click Settings in the sidebar to change language, theme, or manage your profile. You can upload an avatar and delete your account from the Profile tab.

apiAccess.title: API Access
apiAccess.body: Developers can access the system via the OpenAI-compatible API. Generate an API key from the Admin Portal (M7) and use it as a Bearer token.

moreHelp.title: Need more help?
moreHelp.body: For bug reports, feature requests, or enterprise support, contact the development team.
